subject: Fwd: Allegations of Fraud - JC Household
body_text:
intake packet email #2 (after i turned it in)

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
Date: Wed, Dec 3, 2025 at 12:41 PM
Subject: Re: Allegations of Fraud - JC Household
To: Ferron, Ashley <AFerron@clackamas.us>
Cc: HACC - Relocation <HACC-Relocation@clackamas.us>


I was informed for the first time yesterday, that there were no dogs over
25 lbs allowed in the new location you are going to move us to, which is an
unacceptable position that you have put me in. I expect that this is yet
more negligence and disregard for laws and procedures, which I have
previously mentioned to your office with regards to the use of DEI
programs, to allocate housing based on race. Moreover, i have discovered
that the environmental impact study that was performed on the site was
negligently performed, and therefore all construction on the remaining
properties must cease, as a result of interfering with migratory birds
(canadian geese) under internationally protected treaties, and whose
migratory habitat (hillside PARK) was not preserved, e.g. having long
stretches of grass to consume, take off and land.

You have until December 16th, to acknowledge receipt and provide a remedy,
before I file suit.... Which i would rather avoid considering my entire
business is around automating the law, which would diminish my need to
manually fix the errors of others (and often myself).

https://chatgpt.com/c/69309936-5d58-832e-a360-66a038c94132

intake packet email #2 (after i turned it in)

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
Date: Wed, Dec 3, 2025 at 12:41 PM
Subject: Re: Allegations of Fraud - JC Household
To: Ferron, Ashley <AFerron@clackamas.us>
Cc: HACC - Relocation <HACC-Relocation@clackamas.us>


I was informed for the first time yesterday, that there were no dogs over 25 lbs allowed in the new location you are going to move us to, which is an unacceptable position that you have put me in. I expect that this is yet more negligence and disregard for laws and procedures, which I have previously mentioned to your office with regards to the use of DEI programs, to allocate housing based on race. Moreover, i have discovered that the environmental impact study that was performed on the site was negligently performed, and therefore all construction on the remaining properties must cease, as a result of interfering with migratory birds (canadian geese) under internationally protected treaties, and whose migratory habitat (hillside PARK) was not preserved, e.g. having long stretches of grass to consume, take off and land.

You have until December 16th, to acknowledge receipt and provide a remedy, before I file suit.... Which i would rather avoid considering my entire business is around automating the law, which would diminish my need to manually fix the errors of others (and often myself).

https://chatgpt.com/c/69309936-5d58-832e-a360-66a038c94132

On Tue, Dec 2, 2025 at 10:15 AM Ferron, Ashley <AFerron@clackamas.us> wrote:

Hello,

Blossom and Community Apartments is the name of the building across from Hillside Park that is currently leasing.

 

Thank you,

Ashley Ferron
Pronouns (she/her)
Policy, Performance & Research Analyst, Sr.
Clackamas County Housing & Community Development Division (HCD)

Clackamas County Department of Health, Housing & Human Services
P.O. Box 1510, 13930 S. Gain St, Oregon City, OR 97045-0510
Phone: 503-867-7487 – Text Friendly

Hours of Operation:  Mon – Thur, 7:30 a.m. – 6 p.m.
www.clackamas.us/housingauthority

 

Follow Clackamas County: Facebook | Twitter | YouTube | Nextdoor

Confidentiality Notice: This e-mail message, including any attachments, is for the sole use of the intended recipient(s) and may contain confidential and privileged information. Any unauthorized review, use, disclosure or distribution is prohibited. If you are not the intended recipient, please contact the sender by reply e-mail and destroy all copies of the original message.

We are building a safe Clackamas County where all people thrive, are celebrated for their diverse identities, and know they belong.

 

From: benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
Sent: Tuesday, December 2, 2025 10:07 AM
To: Ferron, Ashley <AFerron@clackamas.us>
Subject: Re: Allegations of Fraud - JC Household

 

Warning: External email. Be cautious opening attachments and links.

 

The only poc I know is at hillside 

On Tue, Dec 2, 2025 at 10:06 AM benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com> wrote:

I don’t know from whom you have heard this or even remember those places names the only pic I one is at hillside

 

On Tue, Dec 2, 2025 at 10:04 AM Ferron, Ashley <AFerron@clackamas.us> wrote:

Hello,

I am available in the Hillside Manor Community Center on Wednesdays from 2 pm to 3 pm. However, it is my understanding that your Household is pursuing a unit in Blossom and Community apartments. If this is the case, their office staff is who will need the packet returned. Please feel free to deliver it to them during their office hours.

 

Thank you,

Ashley Ferron
Pronouns (she/her)
Policy, Performance & Research Analyst, Sr.
Clackamas County Housing & Community Development Division (HCD)

Clackamas County Department of Health, Housing & Human Services
P.O. Box 1510, 13930 S. Gain St, Oregon City, OR 97045-0510
Phone: 503-867-7487 – Text Friendly

Hours of Operation:  Mon – Thur, 7:30 a.m. – 6 p.m.
www.clackamas.us/housingauthority

 

Follow Clackamas County: Facebook | Twitter | YouTube | Nextdoor

Confidentiality Notice: This e-mail message, including any attachments, is for the sole use of the intended recipient(s) and may contain confidential and privileged information. Any unauthorized review, use, disclosure or distribution is prohibited. If you are not the intended recipient, please contact the sender by reply e-mail and destroy all copies of the original message.

We are building a safe Clackamas County where all people thrive, are celebrated for their diverse identities, and know they belong.

 

From: benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
Sent: Tuesday, December 2, 2025 8:55 AM
To: Ferron, Ashley <AFerron@clackamas.us>
Cc: Skee, Charley <CSkee@clackamas.us>; HACC - PM <HACCPM@clackamas.us>; HACC - Relocation <HACC-Relocation@clackamas.us>
Subject: Re: Allegations of Fraud - JC Household

 

Warning: External email. Be cautious opening attachments and links.

 

I got my partners to sign off on this year's business minutes, amendments, and also the IRS taxes. I have also completed the packet that you sent me, but it says not to mail it so please let me know when you're going to be available at the community center, so I can drop it off. 

 

On Tue, Nov 25, 2025 at 10:31 AM Ferron, Ashley <AFerron@clackamas.us> wrote:

Good morning,

Thank you for reaching out and sharing your concerns. I understand there’s a lot happening in the community, and it can be easy to get worried about what others are doing. That said, Carlos’s situation is something we need to address directly with him, and we’ll work with him to obtain the legal documentation needed for his own household.

Right now, the most important thing is for you to focus on sorting out the details of your own household so we can keep your process moving. Once we have the information we need for your own household, we’ll be able to determine the appropriate next steps for your relocation.

Please let me know if you need help with anything related to your own file. I’m here to support you through that process.

Thank you,

Ashley Ferron
Pronouns (she/her)
Policy, Performance & Research Analyst, Sr.
Clackamas County Housing & Community Development Division (HCD)

Clackamas County Department of Health, Housing & Human Services
P.O. Box 1510, 13930 S. Gain St, Oregon City, OR 97045-0510
Phone: 503-867-7487 – Text Friendly

Hours of Operation:  Mon – Thur, 7:30 a.m. – 6 p.m.
www.clackamas.us/housingauthority

 

Follow Clackamas County: Facebook | Twitter | YouTube | Nextdoor

Confidentiality Notice: This e-mail message, including any attachments, is for the sole use of the intended recipient(s) and may contain confidential and privileged information. Any unauthorized review, use, disclosure or distribution is prohibited. If you are not the intended recipient, please contact the sender by reply e-mail and destroy all copies of the original message.

We are building a safe Clackamas County where all people thrive, are celebrated for their diverse identities, and know they belong.

 

From: benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
Sent: Monday, November 24, 2025 12:55 PM
To: Skee, Charley <CSkee@clackamas.us>
Cc: Ferron, Ashley <AFerron@clackamas.us>; HACC - PM <HACCPM@clackamas.us>; HACC - Relocation <HACC-Relocation@clackamas.us>
Subject: Re: Allegations of Fraud - JC Household

 

Warning: External email. Be cautious opening attachments and links.

Also, Carlos Castillo "adopted" his grandson, for the explicit purpose
of obtaining a government benefit (e.g. more space for himself), and
while he does have his grandkids visit, they are not in fact residents
of his apartment.
